description: rank_search_matches re-ranks the staged 1900-census results against tree subject I1 (Mary 'Bitsie' Jackson, F, b.~1850 Lancaster County, Pennsylvania). Only fires after the formal-name search under-matched and the skill retried with the documented Nickname 'Bitsie', which staged the single Bitsie-Jackson record. The record (ark:/61903/1:1:BJKN-90A, Bitsie Jackson in William Jackson's household) scores as a strong match to I1 despite its personName being the community nickname rather than I1's preferred BirthName 'Mary' — the match engine keys on sex/date/place, not the surface name string. checkAttachments confirms it is unattached (new evidence), so triage prioritizes it. Matched on subjectId; independent of the per-run stagedResultsRef handle.
